archetype.name: Bastion
archetype.note: This archetype offers Reflexive Shield at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Reflexive Shield
feat.special: If you have the Shield Block reaction, damage you take as a result of a Reflex save can trigger that reaction, even if the damage isn’t physical damage.
feat.text: You can use your shield to fend off explosions and the like. When you Raise your Shield, you gain your shield’s circumstance bonus to Reflex saves.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.

sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
